description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly blue and gray color scheme. The body is angular and robust, with a fixed stock and a prominent scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The barrel is long and straight, ending in a squared muzzle device, and a detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver. The grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the lower section, with ergonomic shaping for user comfort. The rifle also includes a fore-end with a rail system for potential attachments. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance.
description: A modern blue and gray tactical rifle with a fixed stock, scope, and detachable box magazine, featuring a long barrel and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, fixed stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the scope and the slim profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the scope, stock, and magazine.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the magazine, trigger area, and the underside of the barrel.
